ThingDef.label: P890 (P220)
ThingDef.description: A streamlined handgun designed for straightforward handling and precise shot placement. Chambered for a heavier cartridge, it delivers strong stopping power with a steady, deliberate firing rhythm while maintaining a relatively slim profile.

ThingDef.label: P890 INF (P220)
ThingDef.description: A streamlined handgun designed for straightforward handling and precise shot placement. Chambered for a heavier cartridge, it delivers strong stopping power with a steady, deliberate firing rhythm while maintaining a relatively slim profile. INF stands for Infantry. This variant represents the standardise weapon used by a soldier. It's good in build and good at medium to long range.

ThingDef.label: P890 SF (P220)
ThingDef.description: A streamlined handgun designed for straightforward handling and precise shot placement. Chambered for a heavier cartridge, it delivers strong stopping power with a steady, deliberate firing rhythm while maintaining a relatively slim profile. SF stands for Special Forces. This variant is equipped with a suppressor and more quality teched gear. Perfect for anyone who needs to be stealthy and efficient.

ThingDef.label: P890 SNP (P220)
ThingDef.description: A streamlined handgun designed for straightforward handling and precise shot placement. Chambered for a heavier cartridge, it delivers strong stopping power with a steady, deliberate firing rhythm while maintaining a relatively slim profile.

ThingDef.label: .50 GS (Desert Eagle)
ThingDef.description: Built around a gas-operated system rarely seen in handguns, this design delivers extreme power at the cost of weight and recoil. Its heavy frame helps manage the force, but each shot remains deliberate, favoring impact over speed.

ThingDef.label: .50 GS INF (Desert Eagle)
ThingDef.description: Built around a gas-operated system rarely seen in handguns, this design delivers extreme power at the cost of weight and recoil. Its heavy frame helps manage the force, but each shot remains deliberate, favoring impact over speed.

ThingDef.label: .50 GS SF (Desert Eagle)
ThingDef.description: Built around a gas-operated system rarely seen in handguns, this design delivers extreme power at the cost of weight and recoil. Its heavy frame helps manage the force, but each shot remains deliberate, favoring impact over speed. SF stands for Special Forces. This variant is equipped with a suppressor and more quality teched gear. Perfect for anyone who needs to be stealthy and efficient.

ThingDef.label: .50 GS SNP (Desert Eagle)
ThingDef.description: Built around a gas-operated system rarely seen in handguns, this design delivers extreme power at the cost of weight and recoil. Its heavy frame helps manage the force, but each shot remains deliberate, favoring impact over speed.

ThingDef.label: X12 (Glock 17)
ThingDef.description: A streamlined handgun designed for straightforward handling and precise shot placement. Chambered for a heavier cartridge, it delivers strong stopping power with a steady, deliberate firing rhythm while maintaining a relatively slim profile.

ThingDef.label: X12 INF (Glock 17)
ThingDef.description: A streamlined handgun designed for straightforward handling and precise shot placement. Chambered for a heavier cartridge, it delivers strong stopping power with a steady, deliberate firing rhythm while maintaining a relatively slim profile. INF stands for Infantry. This variant represents the standardise weapon used by a soldier. It's good in build and good at medium to long range.

ThingDef.label: X12 SF (Glock 17)
ThingDef.description: A streamlined handgun designed for straightforward handling and precise shot placement. Chambered for a heavier cartridge, it delivers strong stopping power with a steady, deliberate firing rhythm while maintaining a relatively slim profile. SF stands for Special Forces. This variant is equipped with a suppressor and more quality teched gear. Perfect for anyone who needs to be stealthy and efficient.

ThingDef.label: X12 SNP (Glock 17)
ThingDef.description: A streamlined handgun designed for straightforward handling and precise shot placement. Chambered for a heavier cartridge, it delivers strong stopping power with a steady, deliberate firing rhythm while maintaining a relatively slim profile.

ThingDef.label: Basilisk (300 Magnum)
ThingDef.description: A high-power cartridge designed for long-range performance, delivering strong velocity and energy over extended distances. Its increased recoil reflects its capability, favoring precision and impact where range and penetration are critical.

ThingDef.label: Basilisk INF (300 Magnum)
ThingDef.description: A high-power cartridge designed for long-range performance, delivering strong velocity and energy over extended distances. Its increased recoil reflects its capability, favoring precision and impact where range and penetration are critical.

ThingDef.label: Basilisk SNP (300 Magnum)
ThingDef.description: A high-power cartridge designed for long-range performance, delivering strong velocity and energy over extended distances. Its increased recoil reflects its capability, favoring precision and impact where range and penetration are critical.

ThingDef.label: X13 Auto (Glock 18)
ThingDef.description: A fully automatic handgun built for extreme rate of fire in a compact form. Its lightweight frame allows rapid bursts at close range, emphasizing volume and speed over precision.

ThingDef.label: X13 Auto INF (Glock 18)
ThingDef.description: A fully automatic handgun built for extreme rate of fire in a compact form. Its lightweight frame allows rapid bursts at close range, emphasizing volume and speed over precision. INF stands for Infantry. This variant represents the standardise weapon used by a soldier. It's good in build and good at medium to long range.

ThingDef.label: X13 Auto SF (Glock 18)
ThingDef.description: A fully automatic handgun built for extreme rate of fire in a compact form. Its lightweight frame allows rapid bursts at close range, emphasizing volume and speed over precision. SF stands for Special Forces. This variant is equipped with a suppressor and more quality teched gear. Perfect for anyone who needs to be stealthy and efficient.

ThingDef.label: X13 Auto SNP (Glock 18)
ThingDef.description: A fully automatic handgun built for extreme rate of fire in a compact form. Its lightweight frame allows rapid bursts at close range, emphasizing volume and speed over precision.

ThingDef.label: X13 Impact (Glock 18 Roni)
ThingDef.description: Housed within a stabilizing conversion kit, this configuration transforms the platform into a compact carbine-style system. Added support points and improved handling make its high rate of fire more controllable, extending its effectiveness beyond typical handgun range.

ThingDef.label: X13 Impact INF (Glock 18 Roni)
ThingDef.description: Housed within a stabilizing conversion kit, this configuration transforms the platform into a compact carbine-style system. Added support points and improved handling make its high rate of fire more controllable, extending its effectiveness beyond typical handgun range.

ThingDef.label: X13 Impact SF (Glock 18 Roni)
ThingDef.description: Housed within a stabilizing conversion kit, this configuration transforms the platform into a compact carbine-style system. Added support points and improved handling make its high rate of fire more controllable, extending its effectiveness beyond typical handgun range. SF stands for Special Forces. This variant is equipped with a suppressor and more quality teched gear. Perfect for anyone who needs to be stealthy and efficient.

ThingDef.label: X13 Impact SNP (Glock 18 Roni)
ThingDef.description: Housed within a stabilizing conversion kit, this configuration transforms the platform into a compact carbine-style system. Added support points and improved handling make its high rate of fire more controllable, extending its effectiveness beyond typical handgun range.

ThingDef.label: .50 GS Magna (Deagle Auto Mod)
ThingDef.description: Modified for automatic fire, this configuration pushes the platform beyond its original design limits. The heavy frame helps absorb some of the force, but its extreme recoil and power make it difficult to control, favoring raw output over precision.

ThingDef.label: .50 GS Magna INF (Deagle Auto Mod)
ThingDef.description: Modified for automatic fire, this configuration pushes the platform beyond its original design limits. The heavy frame helps absorb some of the force, but its extreme recoil and power make it difficult to control, favoring raw output over precision. INF stands for Infantry. This variant represents the standardise weapon used by a soldier. It's good in build and good at medium to long range.

ThingDef.label: .50 GS Magna SF (Deagle Auto Mod)
ThingDef.description: Modified for automatic fire, this configuration pushes the platform beyond its original design limits. The heavy frame helps absorb some of the force, but its extreme recoil and power make it difficult to control, favoring raw output over precision. SF stands for Special Forces. This variant is equipped with a suppressor and more quality teched gear. Perfect for anyone who needs to be stealthy and efficient.

ThingDef.label: .50 GS Magna SNP (Deagle Auto Mod)
ThingDef.description: Modified for automatic fire, this configuration pushes the platform beyond its original design limits. The heavy frame helps absorb some of the force, but its extreme recoil and power make it difficult to control, favoring raw output over precision.

ThingDef.label: FTAC Siege (TEC-9)
ThingDef.description: A simple automatic weapon built around a blowback system with a tubular receiver. Its high rate of fire and large magazine capacity favor sustained bursts at close range, though its basic design makes control more difficult during continuous fire.

ThingDef.label: FTAC Siege INF (TEC-9)
ThingDef.description: A simple automatic weapon built around a blowback system with a tubular receiver. Its high rate of fire and large magazine capacity favor sustained bursts at close range, though its basic design makes control more difficult during continuous fire.

ThingDef.label: FTAC Siege SF (TEC-9)
ThingDef.description: A simple automatic weapon built around a blowback system with a tubular receiver. Its high rate of fire and large magazine capacity favor sustained bursts at close range, though its basic design makes control more difficult during continuous fire. SF stands for Special Forces. This variant is equipped with a supressor and more quality teched gear. Perfect for anyone who needs to be stealthy and efficent.

ThingDef.label: FTAC Siege SNP (TEC-9)
ThingDef.description: A simple automatic weapon built around a blowback system with a tubular receiver. Its high rate of fire and large magazine capacity favor sustained bursts at close range, though its basic design makes control more difficult during continuous fire.

ThingDef.label: 9MM Daemon (Staccato P)
ThingDef.description: A precision-focused handgun built on a refined frame with a crisp trigger and strong recoil control. Its design favors fast, accurate shooting, allowing confident shot placement during rapid engagements.

ThingDef.label: 9MM Daemon INF (Staccato P)
ThingDef.description: A precision-focused handgun built on a refined frame with a crisp trigger and strong recoil control. Its design favors fast, accurate shooting, allowing confident shot placement during rapid engagements. INF stands for Infantry. This variant represents the standardise weapon used by a soldier. It's good in build and good at medium to long range.

ThingDef.label: 9MM Daemon SF (Staccato P)
ThingDef.description: A precision-focused handgun built on a refined frame with a crisp trigger and strong recoil control. Its design favors fast, accurate shooting, allowing confident shot placement during rapid engagements. SF stands for Special Forces. This variant is equipped with a suppressor and more quality teched gear. Perfect for anyone who needs to be stealthy and efficient.

ThingDef.label: 9MM Daemon SNP (Staccato P)
ThingDef.description: A precision-focused handgun built on a refined frame with a crisp trigger and strong recoil control. Its design favors fast, accurate shooting, allowing confident shot placement during rapid engagements.
